Top Sessions Captured

  • '# Samples Active' shows the number of ASH samples in which the session was found waiting for that particular event. The percentage shown in this column is calculated with respect to wall clock time and not total database activity.
  • 'XIDs' shows the number of distinct transaction IDs sampled in ASH when the session was waiting for that particular event
  • For sessions running Parallel Queries, this section will NOT aggregate the PQ slave activity into the session issuing the PQ. Refer to the 'Top Sessions running PQs' section for such statistics.

0az7czjdw8z7j declare lbRec dbms_rcvman.lbRec_t; lbCursor db ms_rcvman.lbCursor_t; first boolean := FALSE; ret boolean; begin if (:first > 0) then first := TRUE; end if; <<next_row>> ret := dbms_rcvman .listBackup( lbRecOut => lbRec, firstCall => first, only_obsolete => TRUE, redundancy => :redundancy, piped_call => FALSE, lbCursor =&g t; lbCursor, lbState => dbms_rcvman.lbStatePck, extRlKeepSCN => NULL); if (not ret) then raise no_data_found; elsif (lbRec.pkey is not null and lbR ec.is_rdf = 'YES') then :backup_type := lbRec.backup_type; :file_type := lbRec.file_type; :key := lbRec.pkey; else first := FALSE; goto next_row; end if; e nd;
68jrptnbgv7ndSELECT DISTINCT "VBAK"."VBELN& quot; FROM "VBUK" INNER JOIN "VBAK" ON "VBUK"."MANDT"="VBAK"."MANDT" AND "VBUK"." ;MANDT"="VBAK"."MANDT" AND "VBUK"."VBELN"="VBAK"."VBELN" WHERE "VBUK"."MAND T"=:A0 AND "VBAK"."AUART" IN (:A1, :A2, :A3, :A4, :A5, :A6, :A7, :A8, :A9, :A10, :A11, :A12, :A13, :A14, :A15, :A16) AND "VBU K"."LFSTK"<>'C' AND "VBUK"."GBSTK"<>'C'
80sgs4h8941vkSELECT "AUFNR", "KOSTV", &q uot;PRCTR" FROM "AUFK" WHERE "MANDT"=:A0 AND "KOSTV" IN (:A1, :A2, :A3, :A4, :A5)
aszq9u49bbv2xSELECT "BEF_VBELN" FROM "/TXN/ T_TQSPL_LOG" WHERE "CLIENT"=:A0 AND "TRKID"=:A1
gn6n99xwfuba9UPDATE "/TXN/T_API_STATS" SET "C OUNTER"=:A0, "LAST_UPDATE_TIME"=:A1, "USER_ID"=:A2, "BLOCKTYPE"=:A3, "BLOCKNAME"=:A4 WHERE "CLIENT"= :A5 AND "APPLICATION"=:A6 AND "CREATED_DATE"=:A7 RETURNING "BLOCKNAME" INTO :A8
gst615mfyydunSELECT * FROM "NRIV" "NRIV&quo t; WHERE "CLIENT"=:A0 AND "OBJECT"=:A1 AND "SUBOBJECT"=:A2 AND "NRRANGENR"=:A3 AND "TOYEAR"=:A4 FOR UPDAT E
